name: HTTP → JSON Transform → Database ETL
description: Fetches data from an external API, transforms the JSON structure, and loads it into a database table.

required_secrets.description: PostgreSQL connection URL for target database

replacements.config_delta: Replace SOURCE_URL+TARGET_TABLE with a custom QUERY (e.g. INSERT INTO ... VALUES (...)). Use when you need parameterized SQL, conflict handling (ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE), or multi-statement transactions.
Replace SELECTOR+TRANSFORM with SYSTEM_PROMPT describing the transformation in natural language. Useful for unstructured API responses where the schema varies or field extraction requires reasoning.
